problem_text_cn:
4-26 约束在某参考系 $xy$ 平面上运动的质点系，任一时刻动量记作 $\mathbf{p}$。试证：
(1) 若 $\mathbf{p}=0$，则该时刻质点系相对 $xy$ 平面上所有参考点的角动量相同；
(2) 若 $\mathbf{p}\neq 0$，则在 $xy$ 平面上必有一条相应的瞬时直线，使得该时刻质点系相对此直线上任何一点的角动量都是零。
problem_text_en:
4-26 A system of particles is constrained to move in the $xy$ plane of a given reference frame. Let the total momentum at any instant be $\mathbf{p}$. Prove that:
(1) If $\mathbf{p}=0$, then at that instant the angular momentum of the system is the same about all reference points in the $xy$ plane.
(2) If $\mathbf{p}\neq 0$, there must be a corresponding instantaneous straight line in the $xy$ plane such that the angular momentum of the system about any point on that line is zero.
problem_solution_cn:
证 对 $xy$ 平面上任一参考点 $O$，质点系的角动量可表为
$$ \mathbf{L}_{O}=\sum_{i} \mathbf{r}_{i}\times m_{i}\mathbf{v}_{i}. $$
对 $xy$ 平面上另一参考点 $Q$，记 $\mathbf{R}_{0}$ 为 $O$ 指向 $Q$ 的径矢，则有
$$ \mathbf{r}_{i}=\mathbf{R}_{0}+\mathbf{r}'_{i}, $$
于是
$$ \begin{aligned} \mathbf{L}_{Q}&=\sum_{i}\mathbf{r}'_{i}\times m_{i}\mathbf{v}_{i} \\ &=\sum_{i}(\mathbf{r}_{i}-\mathbf{R}_{0})\times m_{i}\mathbf{v}_{i} \\ &=\mathbf{L}_{0}-\mathbf{R}_{0}\times\mathbf{p}. \end{aligned} $$ ①
(1) 若 $\mathbf{p}=0$，由①得 $\mathbf{L}_{Q}=\mathbf{L}_{0}$，与 $Q$ 点位置无关，命题得证。
(2) 若 $\mathbf{p}\neq 0$，再分两种情况讨论。
设 $\mathbf{L}_{0}=0$，则只要 $\mathbf{R}_{0}\parallel\mathbf{p}$，必有 $\mathbf{L}_{Q}=0$。因此，在 $xy$ 平面上过 $O$ 点作一与 $\mathbf{p}$ 平行的直线，质点系相对此直线上任何一点 $Q$，均有 $\mathbf{L}_{Q}=0$。
设 $\mathbf{L}_{0}\neq 0$，可将 $\mathbf{p}$ 和 $\mathbf{L}_{0}$ 都平移到 $O$ 点后，各自的方向取为图4-24所示。此时总能在 $xy$ 平面上找到一条与 $\mathbf{p}$ 平行的直线 $MN$，使得 $O$ 点到 $MN$ 的距离为
$$ h=L_{0}/p, $$
而且 $O$ 点到 $MN$ 上任何一点 $Q$ 的径矢 $\mathbf{R}_{0}$ 与 $\mathbf{p}$ 的矢积方向恰好与 $\mathbf{L}_{0}$ 方向一致，则必有
$$ \mathbf{R}_{0}\times\mathbf{p}=\mathbf{L}_{0},\quad \mathbf{L}_{Q}=0, $$
直线 $MN$ 即为所求瞬时直线。
problem_solution_en:
Proof For any reference point $O$ in the $xy$ plane, the angular momentum of the particle system can be written as
$$ \mathbf{L}_{O}=\sum_{i} \mathbf{r}_{i}\times m_{i}\mathbf{v}_{i}. $$
For another reference point $Q$ in the $xy$ plane, let $\mathbf{R}_{0}$ be the position vector from $O$ to $Q$. Then
$$ \mathbf{r}_{i}=\mathbf{R}_{0}+\mathbf{r}'_{i}, $$
hence
$$ \begin{aligned} \mathbf{L}_{Q}&=\sum_{i}\mathbf{r}'_{i}\times m_{i}\mathbf{v}_{i} \\ &=\sum_{i}(\mathbf{r}_{i}-\mathbf{R}_{0})\times m_{i}\mathbf{v}_{i} \\ &=\mathbf{L}_{0}-\mathbf{R}_{0}\times\mathbf{p}. \end{aligned} $$ ①
(1) If $\mathbf{p}=0$, from ① we obtain $\mathbf{L}_{Q}=\mathbf{L}_{0}$, which is independent of the position of $Q$. The statement is proved.
(2) If $\mathbf{p}\neq 0$, we consider two sub‑cases.
Suppose $\mathbf{L}_{0}=0$. Then as long as $\mathbf{R}_{0}\parallel\mathbf{p}$, we have $\mathbf{L}_{Q}=0$. Therefore, draw a line through $O$ parallel to $\mathbf{p}$ in the $xy$ plane; for any point $Q$ on this line, $\mathbf{L}_{Q}=0$.
Suppose $\mathbf{L}_{0}\neq 0$. Translate both $\mathbf{p}$ and $\mathbf{L}_{0}$ to $O$, taking their directions as shown in Figure 4‑24. In the $xy$ plane we can always find a line $MN$ parallel to $\mathbf{p}$ such that the distance from $O$ to $MN$ is
$$ h=L_{0}/p, $$
and the vector product of the position vector $\mathbf{R}_{0}$ from $O$ to any point $Q$ on $MN$ with $\mathbf{p}$ has exactly the direction of $\mathbf{L}_{0}$; then necessarily
$$ \mathbf{R}_{0}\times\mathbf{p}=\mathbf{L}_{0},\quad \mathbf{L}_{Q}=0. $$
The line $MN$ is the required instantaneous line.
img_cn:
图4-23：展示O、Q、P点位置关系的示意图。图中O、Q为xy平面上两个不同的参考点，P为一个质点。标注了O指向Q的径矢$\mathbf{R}_0$和O指向P的径矢$\mathbf{r}_i$。该图用于说明角动量在不同参考点下的变换关系，是推导公式$\mathbf{L}_Q = \mathbf{L}_0 - \mathbf{R}_0 \times \mathbf{p}$的几何基础。

 图4-24：动量$\mathbf{p}$不为零、角动量$\mathbf{L}_0$不为零时的矢量示意图。图中将矢量$\mathbf{p}$和$\mathbf{L}_0$平移至共同起点O。在xy平面上绘制了一条平行于$\mathbf{p}$的直线MN，O点到MN的距离记为$h = L_0 / p$。图中展示了从O指向MN上一点Q的径矢$\mathbf{R}_0$，并说明了$\mathbf{R}_0 \times \mathbf{p}$与$\mathbf{L}_0$的方向关系。此图是证明存在瞬时直线MN使得$\mathbf{L}_Q=0$的关键。
img_en:
Figure 4-23: A schematic diagram showing the positional relationships among points O, Q, and P. O and Q are two different reference points in the xy plane, and P is a particle. The figure labels the position vector $\mathbf{R}_0$ from O to Q and the position vector $\mathbf{r}_i$ from O to P. This diagram illustrates the transformation of angular momentum under different reference points and provides the geometric basis for deriving the formula $\mathbf{L}_Q = \mathbf{L}_0 - \mathbf{R}_0 \times \mathbf{p}$.

 Figure 4-24: A vector diagram for the case when momentum $\mathbf{p}$ is nonzero and angular momentum $\mathbf{L}_0$ is nonzero. The vectors $\mathbf{p}$ and $\mathbf{L}_0$ are translated to a common origin O. In the xy plane, a line MN parallel to $\mathbf{p}$ is drawn, and the distance from O to MN is denoted as $h = L_0 / p$. The figure shows the position vector $\mathbf{R}_0$ from O to a point Q on MN and illustrates the directional relationship between $\mathbf{R}_0 \times \mathbf{p}$ and $\mathbf{L}_0$. This diagram is key to proving the existence of an instantaneous line MN such that $\mathbf{L}_Q = 0$.
problem_answer:
(1) 若 $\mathbf{p}=0$，则 $\mathbf{L}_{Q}=\mathbf{L}_{0}$，与 $Q$ 点位置无关，质点系相对 $xy$ 平面上所有参考点的角动量相同。
(2) 若 $\mathbf{p}\neq 0$，在 $xy$ 平面上存在一条直线 $MN$ 平行于 $\mathbf{p}$，且与 $O$ 点距离为 $h=L_0/p$，使得对 $MN$ 上任何一点 $Q$ 均有 $\mathbf{L}_Q=0$。
